response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the performer as Otonose Kanade based on the hashtag #音乃瀬奏生誕祭2026. 2. Identified the song title 'give it back' via on-screen text and cross-referenced with Cö shu Nie. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'give it back' by Cö shu Nie. 4. Confirmed the performance is continuous throughout the video and structured the JSON accordingly.
response.global_summary: Otonose Kanade performs a cover of 'give it back' by Cö shu Nie during her 2026 Birthday Festival. The performance is a continuous vocal and dance piece spanning the entire video.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performs 'give it back' throughout the entire duration of the video. The performance includes both vocal singing and choreography.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あたたかい涙でふいに目覚めた
焦がれた夢の続きはどこにあるの
寂しいよ
please, give it back
いつになれば楽になれる
押しては返す波に抗がって
白い枕に寝ぼけたままの顔を埋めて
同じ夢を願うほどに増えていくよ
please, give it back
代わりなんていないよ
あなたの匂い思い出せない波にさらって
夢の続きを掴みに行くから待ってて
いつの間にか届く頃には優しさに触れ過ぎた
湿ってく顔上げてみようか
ひとりじゃないって
信じてみたい
信じてみたいの
give it a shot
生まれたばかりの
淡い光に希望を見たの 胸が熱いよ
手を握っていよう
迷わないように
明日からまた
選んだ道を進めるように
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I woke up suddenly with warm tears
Where is the continuation of the dream I longed for?
I'm lonely
please, give it back
When will it be easier?
Resisting the waves that push and return
Buried in the white pillow with a sleepy face
The more I wish for the same dream, the more it grows
please, give it back
There's no replacement
Carried away by the waves that I can't remember your scent
I'll go grab the continuation of the dream, so wait for me
By the time it reaches, I've touched too much kindness
Shall I try lifting my wet face?
I want to believe
That I'm not alone
I want to believe
Give it a shot
I saw hope in the faint light
Just born, my heart is warm
Let's hold hands
So we won't lose our way
So we can continue on the chosen path from tomorrow
